Install the plugin and start writing.' ), ] ); // --- Post 2: Code Examples --- save_pt_post( 'Working with the REST API', 'post', [ text_block( 'h2', 'Reading Portable Text via REST' ), rich_paragraph( [ span( 'The plugin exposes a ' ), span( 'portable_text', [ 'code' ] ), span( ' field on all post types with ' ), span( 'show_in_rest', [ 'code' ] ), span( ' enabled.' ), ] ), [ '_type' => 'codeBlock', '_key' => k(), 'code' => 'async function fetchPosts(page = 1) {\n const response = await fetch(\n `/wp-json/wp/v2/posts?_fields=id,title,portable_text&page=${page}`\n );\n const posts = await response.json();\n return posts;\n}', 'language' => 'javascript' ], text_block( 'h3', 'Writing Content' ), rich_paragraph( [ span( 'You can also ' ), span( 'write', [ 'strong' ] ), span( ' Portable Text content via the REST API using the same field.' ), ] ), [ '_type' => 'codeBlock', '_key' => k(), 'code' => ' function( $object ) {\n $post = get_post( $object["id"] );\n $decoded = json_decode( $post->post_content, true );\n return is_array( $decoded ) ? $decoded : null;\n },\n] );', 'language' => 'php' ], list_item( 'number', 'Fetch posts with the portable_text field' ), list_item( 'number', 'Parse the JSON array of blocks' ), list_item( 'number', 'Render each block according to its _type' ), text_block( 'normal', 'The REST API is the recommended way to interact with Portable Text content programmatically.' ), ] ); // --- Post 3: Markdown Alternate --- $lk2 = k(); save_pt_post( 'Markdown for AI Clients', 'post', [ text_block( 'h2', 'Content Negotiation' ), rich_paragraph( [ span( 'Every page with Portable Text content supports ' ), span( 'content negotiation', [ 'strong' ] ), span( '. // --- Post 5: Query API --- $lk3 = k(); save_pt_post( 'Querying Content by Structure', 'post', [ text_block( 'h2', 'The Query API' ), rich_paragraph( [ span( 'The ' ), span( 'Query API', [ 'strong' ] ), span( ' lets you find posts by block type, style, or annotation, and extract specific blocks across posts.' ), ] ), text_block( 'h3', 'Example: Find All Code Blocks' ), [ '_type' => 'codeBlock', '_key' => k(), 'code' => '# Find all PHP code blocks across all posts\ncurl "/wp-json/wp-portable-text/v1/query?block_type=codeBlock&language=php"\n\n# Find all posts with images\ncurl "/wp-json/wp-portable-text/v1/query?block_type=image"\n\n# Find posts using h1 style\ncurl "/wp-json/wp-portable-text/v1/query?style=h1"', 'language' => 'bash' ], rich_paragraph( [ span( 'See the ' ), span( 'Query API documentation', [ $lk3 ] ), span( ' for full parameter reference and more examples.' ), ], [ [ '_type' => 'link', '_key' => $lk3, 'href' => 'https://github.com/soderlind/wp-portable-text/blob/main/docs/QUERY.md' ], ] ), text_block( 'h3', 'Use Cases' ), list_item( 'number', 'Extract all images for a media audit' ), list_item( 'number', 'Find posts containing specific code languages' ), list_item( 'number', 'Locate all external links across your content' ), list_item( 'number', 'Build a table of contents from heading blocks' ), text_block( 'blockquote', 'Structured storage enables queries that are impossible with HTML-based content.' ), ] );
